site.title: PDF Tools - Kompresor PDF & Gambar Online Gratis
site.description: Alat PDF dan gambar online gratis. Kompres PDF, kompres gambar, konversi PDF ke JPG, dan lainnya. Pemrosesan 100% di browser untuk privasi dan keamanan.

home.title: Alat PDF & Gambar Gratis
home.subtitle: Pemrosesan 100% di browser. File Anda tidak pernah meninggalkan perangkat Anda. Cepat, aman, dan sepenuhnya gratis.

private.title: 100% Pribadi
private.desc: Semua pemrosesan terjadi di browser Anda. File Anda tidak pernah meninggalkan perangkat Anda.

fast.title: Sangat Cepat
fast.desc: Tidak ada waktu tunggu upload. Proses file secara instan di perangkat Anda.

free.title: Sepenuhnya Gratis
free.desc: Tidak ada batasan file, tidak ada watermark, tidak perlu registrasi.

seo.p1: Our PDF and image tools are designed to be simple and intuitive. Just select the tool you need, upload your file, and let our browser-based processor do the work. No software installation required.
seo.p2: Whether you need to compress a large PDF for email, convert images to PDF for documents, or extract images from PDF files, our tools handle it all. All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your files stay private and secure.
seo.p3: PDF Tools works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. There are no file size limits or daily restrictions. Use our tools as much as you need, completely free.
